ip_cidr_range.description: Defines the internal IP range for the connector in CIDR format, required to allocate IP addresses for VPC access. Must be a valid CIDR block within the VPC subnet.

machine_type.description: Specifies the machine type for the VPC access connector, determining the computational resources allocated. Must be a valid Compute Engine machine type.

max_instances.description: Defines the maximum number of instances in the connector's scaling pool, must be between 2 and 10.

max_throughput.description: Defines the maximum throughput in Mbps for the VPC Access Connector, ensuring sufficient bandwidth for connected services.

min_instances.description: Specifies the minimum number of instances for the VPC access connector, ensuring sufficient capacity during low traffic periods. Must be a non-negative integer.

min_throughput.description: Specifies the minimum throughput capacity in Mbps for the VPC access connector, must be between 200 and 1000.

name.description: Unique name for the VPC Access Connector, adhering to Google Cloud's naming conventions.

network.description: Specifies the network in which the VPC access connector will be created, must be an existing network in the project.

subnet.description: Specifies the subnet where the serverless VPC access connector will be deployed; must be in the same region as the connector.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for create, update, and delete operations for the connector, expressed in a format like "5m" for 5 minutes.
